task_completion.description: Navigate to the GDPR/Privacy tools in Matomo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Matomo administration panel is open, specifically showing the 'Privacy', 'GDPR', or 'GDPR Tools' section.

task_completion.description: Search for the target Visitor ID
task_completion.visual_evidence: The string '34c4f238a0b92382' is typed into the search box for finding data subjects or visitors.

task_completion.description: Select the target records for erasure
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search results display the target visitor's data (2 visits), and the agent clicks the button to erase or delete this specific data subject's records.

task_completion.description: Verify the target visitor data has been permanently deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification appears confirming the data erasure, or a subsequent search for '34c4f238a0b92382' returns no results.

task_completion.description: Verify that data for other visitors remains intact
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Matomo dashboard or Visitor Log is shown with records of other visitors still present, proving the entire database was not wiped.

integrity.description: Agent used the Matomo web interface for deletion
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the Matomo web interface in a browser, rather than executing terminal commands, SQL queries, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent performed an actual deletion rather than hiding data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the actual GDPR erasure tool or delete function, rather than just applying a segment or filter to hide the visitor from the current view.

integrity.description: Agent did not delete the entire site or database
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not delete the entire website property in Matomo or drop the database to remove the user.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Visitor ID: 34c4f238a0b92382. The target has exactly 2 visits injected (one yesterday at 14:00, one today at 10:00). The application is Matomo. Success requires deleting all target records (50 pts), preserving other visitor data (30 pts), and performing the deletion during the task (20 pts). Pass threshold is 80/100.
